testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Expected to find: [password must contain atleast 8 to max 32 characters, a capital letter, a small letter, a special character, a number and no space] But returned: [{"password":"Password is mandatory","userLoginEmailId":"EmailId is mandatory"}] expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected to find: [password must contain atleast 8 to max 32 characters, a capital letter, a small letter, a special character, a number and no space] But returned: [{"password":"Password is mandatory","userLoginEmailId":"EmailId is mandatory"}] expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepDefinitions.LoginStepDef.the_response_should_match_the_expected_validation_message_from_excel(LoginStepDef.java:111) at ✽.the response should match the expected validation message from Excel(file:///C:/Users/saphi/eclipse-workspace/Team03_RestfulNinjas_LMS_Hackathon/src/test/resources/features/TC01_Login.feature:9)

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <400> but was <201>.

testcase.failure:
